mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 0.5 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns as investor confidence weakens.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or unemployment rate declines without corresponding equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and federal funds rates (FEDFUNDS) signal stagflationary pressures, causing equity valuations to contract as real rates rise and growth expectations decline.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where both CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS exceed thresholds, or pairwise correlation between proxies and returns drops below 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden drop in industrial production (INDPRO) below its 12-month moving average indicates weakening supply-side capacity, leading to negative S&P 500 returns as recession risks materialize.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or INDPRO rebounds without corresponding equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) signal strong consumer demand for residential construction, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST increases by > 2.0% MoM, or HOUST and SPX correlation falls below 0.20.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence between rising payrolls (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) signals labor market strength, driving positive S&P 500 returns as corporate earnings prospects improve.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 20d returns in > 40% of instances where PAYEMS and UNRATE meet thresholds, or pairwise correlation between proxies and returns drops below 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO) growth indicates robust supply-side capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 returns as corporate margins expand and economic optimism rises.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 60d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO increases by > 1.5% MoM, or INDPRO and SPX correlation falls below 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real sales (RSAFS) combined with strong housing starts (HOUST) indicates robust consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 returns as corporate revenue growth accelerates.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 20d returns in > 45% of instances where RSAFS and HOUST meet thresholds, or pairwise correlation between proxies and returns drops below 0.12.
